title: achillea septentrionalis
intro: Achillea septentrionalis, also known as Northern Yarrow, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Northern Yarrow include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Northern Yarrow can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as an ingredient in skincare products and cosmetics.
